def negative_repeated_try_finally_release_pattern_not_extracted():
    rule_id = "repeated_try_finally_release_pattern_not_extracted"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated manual release patterns that should live behind one helper or context manager."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
